subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from this Prisoner unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, that he worship none save Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا المسجون الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم الا تعبد الا ایاه
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @unity; oneness of humanity
